config.script:
system.perspective.closePopup('100')
	system.perspective.openDock('rightp')

payload = {'IsVisible':int(0)}
	system.perspective.sendMessage('addEditWorkInstruction', payload, scope = 'page' )
	system.perspective.openDock('rightp')
	
	header=self.getSibling("lblHeader").props.text
	header=header[:3]
	if(header=='Add'):
		system.perspective.sendMessage("getIdList",payload = {"FixtureList":[],"StepList":[],"FixtureCount":0,"StepCount":0}, scope = "page")
	
	#Reset	
	self.view.params.AsignedStepList=[]
	self.view.params.AssignedFixtureList=[]
	self.parent.parent.getChild("cntTab").getChild("cntTab").props.currentTabIndex=0
	self.parent.parent.getChild("cntSave").getChild("btnSave").props.enabled=0
	self.parent.parent.getChild("cntTab").getChild("cntTab").getChild("cntStep").getChild("chkSelectAll").props.selected = bool(0)
	
	self.parent.parent.getChild("cntTab").getChild("cntTab").getChild("cntAssigedStep").getChild("cntUpDown").getChild("imgUp").meta.visible=0
	self.parent.parent.getChild("cntTab").getChild("cntTab").getChild("cntAssigedStep").getChild("cntUpDown").getChild("imgDown").meta.visible=0
	self.parent.parent.getChild("cntTab").getChild("cntTab").getChild("cntAssigedStep").getChild("cntUpDown").getChild("imgRemove").meta.visible=0

"""
		Written By: Niladri Banerjee
		Written Date: 30/05/2024
		Purpose: Update assigned OPCodes. 
	"""
	OPData=self.parent.parent.getChild("cntTab").getChild("cntTab").getChild("cntAssigedStep").getChild("tblAssinedSteps").props.data 
	messageType='update_assignedop'
	system.perspective.closePopup('100')
	system.perspective.openDock('rightp')
	system.perspective.sendMessage(messageType,{'assignedop':OPData},scope = 'page' )

"""
	Written By: Niladri Banerjee
	Written Date: 22/05/2024
	View Name: AddEditWorkInsruction
	Control Name: btnSave
	Event: onClick
	Purpose: To save record			 
					
	"""
	
	try:	
	# Start code to save step details
		stepData=self.parent.parent.getChild("cntTab").getChild("cntTab").getChild("cntAssigedStep").getChild("tblAssinedSteps").props.data 
		system.perspective.print(stepData)
		for rows in range(len(stepData)):
			workstationid=self.view.params.workStationId
			wiStepId=stepData[rows]['WIStepId']
			opcodeid=stepData[rows]['ID']
			opdefinitionid=stepData[rows]['OP Definition ID']
			sequence=stepData[rows]['Sequence']
			params = {"wiStepId":wiStepId,"workstationid":workstationid,"opcodeid":opcodeid,"opdefinitionid":opdefinitionid,"sequence":sequence} 
			result = system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/Master/WorkInstructionConfiguration/AddAssignedStep",params)		
			#system.perspective.print('Insert result'+str(result))
			# End code to save step details
			
		
		# pass stepList to the WI_GeneralPanel		
		payload = {'IsVisible':int(0)}
		system.perspective.sendMessage('addEditWorkInstruction', payload, scope = 'page' )
		system.perspective.openDock('rightp')
		system.perspective.sendMessage('getAssignedStepFixCount',scope = 'page')
		#Reset	
		self.view.params.AsignedStepList=[]
		#self.view.params.AssignedFixtureList=[]
		self.parent.parent.getChild("cntTab").getChild("cntTab").props.currentTabIndex=0
		self.props.enabled=0
		self.parent.parent.getChild("cntTab").getChild("cntTab").getChild("cntStep").getChild("chkSelectAll").props.selected = bool(0)
		self.parent.parent.getChild("cntTab").getChild("cntTab").getChild("cntStep").getChild("cntAdd").getChild("btnAdd").props.enabled = 0
		self.parent.parent.getChild("cntTab").getChild("cntTab").getChild("cntAssigedStep").getChild("cntUpDown").getChild("imgUp").meta.visible=0
		self.parent.parent.getChild("cntTab").getChild("cntTab").getChild("cntAssigedStep").getChild("cntUpDown").getChild("imgDown").meta.visible=0
		self.parent.parent.getChild("cntTab").getChild("cntTab").getChild("cntAssigedStep").getChild("cntUpDown").getChild("imgRemove").meta.visible=0
	
	except:	
		#start of except block		
		screenName ='Work instruction' 
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/PopUp/AddEditWorkInstruction')
		errorFunction = str('Event:onClick - cntSave/btnSave')
		errorType=str('Application')
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID()) 
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error occur			
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber)

"""
		Written By: Niladri Banerjee
		Written Date: 30/05/2024
		Purpose: Cancel selection and reset back to original values.		 
							
	"""
	payload = {'IsVisible':int(0)}
	system.perspective.sendMessage('addEditWorkInstruction', payload, scope = 'page' )
	system.perspective.openDock('rightp')
	
	header=self.parent.parent.getChild("cntHeader").getChild("lblHeader").props.text
	header=header[:3]
	system.perspective.print('Header'+str(header))
	if(header=='Add'):
		system.perspective.sendMessage("getIdList",payload = {"FixtureList":[],"StepList":[],"FixtureCount":0,"StepCount":0}, scope = "page")
	
	#Reset	
	#self.view.params.AsignedStepList=''
	self.view.params.AssignedFixtureList=''
	self.parent.parent.getChild("cntTab").getChild("cntTab").props.currentTabIndex=0
	self.parent.parent.getChild("cntSave").getChild("btnSave").props.enabled=0
	self.parent.parent.getChild("cntTab").getChild("cntTab").getChild("cntStep").getChild("chkSelectAll").props.selected = bool(0)
	self.parent.parent.getChild("cntTab").getChild("cntTab").getChild("cntAssigedStep").getChild("cntUpDown").getChild("imgUp").meta.visible=0
	self.parent.parent.getChild("cntTab").getChild("cntTab").getChild("cntAssigedStep").getChild("cntUpDown").getChild("imgDown").meta.visible=0
	self.parent.parent.getChild("cntTab").getChild("cntTab").getChild("cntAssigedStep").getChild("cntUpDown").getChild("imgRemove").meta.visible=0

system.perspective.closePopup('100')
	system.perspective.openDock('rightp')

"""
	Written By: Niladri Banerjee
	Written Date: 30/05/2024
	Purpose:
			This Script is written to add selection against OPCode.
	"""	
	try:			
		valueToSet = event.value
		self.props.data[event.row][event.column] = valueToSet
		currentData = self.props.data
		
		length = len(currentData)
		match = 0
		for row in range(length):
			isSelect = self.props.data[row]['Select']
			if(str(isSelect) == 'True'):
				match = 1
				self.parent.getChild("cntAdd").getChild("btnAdd").props.enabled = 1
				break
			
				
			
	except: 
		#Start of except block  
			screenName ='AddEditWorkInstruction'   
			filePath=str('Project_VECV/PopUp/AddEditWorkInstruction')  
			errorFunction = str('Event:onEditCellCommit  -> tblStep')  
			errorType=str('Application')  
			errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())
			description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
			lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
			Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber) 
		#End of except block

"""
	Written By: Niladri Banerjee
	Written Date: 30/05/2024
	Purpose:
			This Script is written to assigned selected row id to
			stepId custom property .
	"""	
	
	pydata = self.props.data
	if(len(pydata) > 0):
		self.parent.getChild("cntAdd").getChild("btnAdd").props.enabled=1

"""
	Written By: Niladri Banerjee
	Written Date: 21/05/2024
	Purpose:			 
			Get step deatils from the datatabase by step Id and create
			  AsignedStepList			
	"""	
	
	stepID=self.view.custom.stepId	
	assignedList = []
	#assignedFixtureList = []
	sequenceNo=1
	try: 
		# Check AsignedStepList contails data if yes then seq no is len(assignedList)+1
		# else sequenceNo=1
		if(len(self.view.params.AsignedStepList)>0):
			assignedList=self.view.params.AsignedStepList
			sequenceNo=int(len(assignedList))+1	
			#system.perspective.print("Loop1")	
		# Get step details from the available step by selected row
		selectedRow =self.parent.parent.getChild("tblStep").props.selection.selectedRow
		selectedStepdata = self.parent.parent.getChild("tblStep").props.data
		#system.perspective.print(selectedStepdata)
		stepclassId = 0
		if(len(selectedStepdata) > 0):
			#system.perspective.print("Loop2")	
			for row in range(len(selectedStepdata)):
				isSelect = selectedStepdata[row]['Select']
				#system.perspective.print("Loop3")	
				if(str(isSelect) == 'True' or str(isSelect) == '1'):
					stepId= selectedStepdata[row]['ID']
					stepName= selectedStepdata[row]['OP Code']
					###############SD 11/1/2023
					stepName = unicode(stepName,'utf-8')
					####end
					stepclassId= selectedStepdata[row]['OP Definition ID']
					description= selectedStepdata[row]['Description'] 
					Model=selectedStepdata[row]['Model'] 
					#system.perspective.print(stepId)	
#					system.perspective.print(stepName)	
#					system.perspective.print(stepclassId)	
#					system.perspective.print(description)	
					###############SD 11/1/2023
					description = unicode(description,'utf-8')
					####end
					#reworkSplI= selectedStepdata[row]['Rework special instruction']
					#rework=selectedStepdata[row]['Rework']			
					#eDHR = selectedStepdata[row]['eDHR']	
					stepClass = selectedStepdata[row]['OP Definition']	#RA 07-07-2023 	
					#system.perspective.print(stepClass)
					assignedList.append({"WIOPID":None,"ID":stepId,"Sequence":int(sequenceNo),"OPCode":stepName,"OP Definition ID":stepclassId,"Description":description,"OPDefinition":stepClass,"Model":Model})
					sequenceNo=int(sequenceNo)+1	
					#system.perspective.print(sequenceNo)	
					self.view.params.AsignedStepList = assignedList
					self.parent.parent.getChild("tblStep").props.selection.selectedRow=-1

			#Add fixture in list
#			if(stepclassId==3):
#				if(len(self.view.params.AssignedFixtureList)>0):
#					assignedFixtureList=self.view.params.AssignedFixtureList
#					#Fuction call to fixture list								
#				self.view.params.AssignedFixtureList=Project_VECV.Configuration.WorkInstuction.AddEditWorkInstruction.GetWIFixtureList(assignedFixtureList,stepId)
			#End if Step class is 3 then add fixture in assignedFixtureList
		
		# chnage current tab index to 2-assigned step list and save button is enabled
		if(len(assignedList)>0):
			self.parent.parent.parent.parent.getChild("cntTab").props.currentTabIndex=1
			self.props.enabled=0
			#-----
			import math		
			page=float(sequenceNo)/10
			page=math.ceil(page)
			self.parent.parent.parent.getChild("cntAssigedStep").getChild("tblAssinedSteps").props.pager.activePage=page

			#----
			self.parent.parent.getChild("chkSelectAll").props.selected = bool(0)
			selectedStepdata = self.parent.parent.getChild("tblStep").props.data
			availableList = []
			if(len(selectedStepdata) > 0):
				for row in range(len(selectedStepdata)):
					stepId= selectedStepdata[row]['ID']
					stepName= selectedStepdata[row]['OP Code']
					###############SD 11/1/2023
					stepName = unicode(stepName,'utf-8')
					####end
					stepclassId= selectedStepdata[row]['OP Definition ID']
					description= selectedStepdata[row]['Description']
					Model=selectedStepdata[row]['Model']  
					###############SD 11/1/2023
					description = unicode(description,'utf-8')
					####end
#					reworkSplI= selectedStepdata[row]['Rework special instruction']
#					rework=selectedStepdata[row]['Rework']
#					eDHR = 	selectedStepdata[row]['eDHR']
					stepClass = selectedStepdata[row]['OP Definition']		
					availableList.append({"ID":stepId,"OP Code":stepName,"Description":description,"OP Definition":stepClass,"OP Definition ID":stepclassId,"Model":Model,"Select":0})
					self.parent.parent.getChild("tblStep").props.selection.selectedRow=-1
							
				self.parent.parent.getChild("tblStep").props.data = availableList
				self.parent.parent.getChild("tblStep").props.filter.text=''
	except:	
		#start of except block		
		screenName ='Work instruction' 
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/PopUp/AddEditWorkInstruction')
		errorFunction = str('Event:onClick- cntStep/btnAdd')
		errorType=str('Application')
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID()) 
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error occur			
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber)

"""
	Written By: Niladri Banerjee
	Written Date: 21/05/2024
	Purpose:
			This Script is written to assigned selection to all OPCodes
	"""	
	try:
		checked = self.props.selected
		
		#system.perspective.print('not moving forword '+str(type(checked)))
		#system.perspective.print('checked_'+ str(checked))
		#system.perspective.print('not moving forword'+str(type(self.props.selected)))
		
		if str(self.props.selected)=='True':
			value=1
			#system.perspective.print('value '+str(value) + 'value_type '+str(type(value)))
		else:
			value=0
			#system.perspective.print('value '+str(value) + 'value_type '+str(type(value)))
			
		filteredData = self.getSibling("tblStep").props.filter.results.data
		system.perspective.print('filteredData__'+str(filteredData))
		actualData = self.getSibling("tblStep").props.data
		selectedStepdata = 	actualData
		availableList = []
		'''
		system.perspective.print('filteredData '+str(filteredData))
		system.perspective.print('actualData '+str(actualData))
		system.perspective.print('selectedStepdata '+str(selectedStepdata))
		system.perspective.print('availableList '+str(availableList))
		'''
		for row in range(len(actualData)):
			id=str(actualData[row]["ID"])
			system.perspective.print('id_'+str(id))
#			select = int(0)
			if(len(filteredData) != 0):
				for rows in range(len(filteredData)):
					value = int(0)
					filteredId = str(filteredData[rows]["ID"])
					system.perspective.print('filteredId'+str(filteredId))
					#system.perspective.print('only_ID'+str(id))

					if(id == filteredId):
#						if(int(value)==1):
						select = int(1)
						if not self.props.selected:
							select = int(0)
						#system.perspective.print('select_'+str(select))
						break
					else:
						select = int(0)
	
			elif(len(filteredData) == 0):	
				if value == 1:
					select = int(1)
				elif value == 0:
					select = int(0)
			#system.perspective.print('select '+str(select) + 'select_type'+str(type(select))	)
			stepId= selectedStepdata[row]['ID']
			stepName= selectedStepdata[row]['Step name']
			###############SD 11/1/2023
			stepName = unicode(stepName,'utf-8')
			####end
			stepclassId= selectedStepdata[row]['StepClassId']
			description= selectedStepdata[row]['Description'] 
			###############SD 11/1/2023
			description = unicode(description,'utf-8')
			####end
			reworkSplI= selectedStepdata[row]['Rework special instruction']
			rework=selectedStepdata[row]['Rework']
			eDHR = 	selectedStepdata[row]['eDHR']
			stepClass = selectedStepdata[row]['Step class']		
			availableList.append({"ID":stepId,"Step name":stepName,"Description":description,"eDHR":eDHR,"Step class":stepClass,"StepClassId":stepclassId,"Rework special instruction":reworkSplI,"Rework":rework,"Select":select})
			#self.getSibling("tblStep").props.selection.selectedRow=-1
		#system.perspective.print('select availableList:'+str(availableList))				
		self.getSibling("tblStep").props.data = availableList
#			self.getSibling("tblStep").props.filter.results.data = availableList
		self.parent.getChild("cntAdd").getChild("btnAdd").props.enabled = 1
		

			
	except: 
	#Start of except block  
		screenName ='AddEditWorkInstruction'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/PopUp/AddEditWorkInstruction')  
		errorFunction = str('Event:onCLick  -> chkSelectAll')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber) 
	#End of except block

"""
	Written By: Niladri Banerjee
	Written Date: 21/05/2024
	Purpose:			 
			Add edited ID value into assigned list			
	"""	
	valueToSet = event.value	
	self.props.data[event.row][event.column] = valueToSet
	self.view.params.AsignedStepList[event.row][event.column]=bool(valueToSet)

"""
	Written By: Niladri Banerjee
	Written Date: 21/05/2024
	View Name: AddEditWorkInsruction
	Purpose:			 
			change selected row index up			
	"""	
	#Up button code
	seqNumber=self.view.custom.seqNumber
	try:
		selectedRow=int(self.parent.parent.getChild("tblAssinedSteps").props.selection.selectedRow)
		if(selectedRow!=-1):		
			tableData=self.parent.parent.getChild("tblAssinedSteps").props.data
			for rows in range(len(tableData)):
				if(rows==selectedRow):				
					seqNumber=int(tableData[rows]['Sequence'])					
					

		beforeSeqNumber = (seqNumber -1)	
		newAsignedStepList=[]
		sortedNewAsignedStepList = []
		asignedStepList = self.view.params.AsignedStepList
		
		#new list with updated seq no
		#updated seq no are 	
		if(len(asignedStepList)>0):		
			for rows in range(len(asignedStepList)):
				wiStepId=asignedStepList[rows]['WIOPID']
				stepId=int(asignedStepList[rows]['ID'])
				sequenceNo = int(asignedStepList[rows]['Sequence'])
				stepName = str(asignedStepList[rows]['OPCode'])
				###############SD 11/1/2023
				stepName = unicode(stepName,'utf-8')
				####end
				stepclassId= asignedStepList[rows]['OP Definition ID']
				description = str(asignedStepList[rows]['Description'])
				Model= str(asignedStepList[rows]['Model']) 
				###############SD 11/1/2023
				description = unicode(description,'utf-8')
				####end
#				reworkWPrev = bool(asignedStepList[rows]['Rework with previous'])
#				completeWPrev = bool(asignedStepList[rows]['Complete with previous'])  
#				isMandatory = bool(asignedStepList[rows]['Mandatory'])
#				reworkSplI= asignedStepList[rows]['Rework special instruction']
#				rework= asignedStepList[rows]['Rework']	
#				eDHR = asignedStepList[rows]['eDHR']	
				stepClass = asignedStepList[rows]['OPDefinition']	#RA 07-07-2023 		
				if(seqNumber==asignedStepList[rows]['Sequence']):
					sequenceNo = beforeSeqNumber
				elif(beforeSeqNumber == asignedStepList[rows]['Sequence']):	
						sequenceNo = seqNumber
				newAsignedStepList.append({"WIOPID":wiStepId,"ID":stepId,"Sequence":sequenceNo,"OPCode":stepName,"OP Definition ID":stepclassId,"Description":description,"OPDefinition":stepClass,"Model":Model})
		#Script for sort list by seq no	
		if(len(newAsignedStepList)>0):	
			Length =  len(newAsignedStepList)
			for row in range(Length):			
				for rows in range(len(newAsignedStepList)):
					wiStepId=newAsignedStepList[rows]['WIOPID']
					stepId=int(newAsignedStepList[rows]['ID'])
					stepclassId= newAsignedStepList[rows]['OP Definition ID']
					sequenceNo = int(newAsignedStepList[rows]['Sequence'])
					stepName = str(newAsignedStepList[rows]['OPCode'])
					###############SD 11/1/2023
					stepName = unicode(stepName,'utf-8')
					####end
					description = str(newAsignedStepList[rows]['Description']) 
					Model= str(newAsignedStepList[rows]['Model']) 
					###############SD 11/1/2023
					description = unicode(description,'utf-8')
					####end
#					reworkWPrev = bool(newAsignedStepList[rows]['Rework with previous'])
#					completeWPrev = bool(asignedStepList[rows]['Complete with previous'])  
#					isMandatory = bool(newAsignedStepList[rows]['Mandatory'])
#					reworkSplI= newAsignedStepList[rows]['Rework special instruction']
#					rework= newAsignedStepList[rows]['Rework']			
#					eDHR = asignedStepList[rows]['eDHR']
					stepClass = newAsignedStepList[rows]['OPDefinition']	#RA 07-07-2023 		
					if(int(row + 1) == int(newAsignedStepList[rows]['Sequence'])):
						sortedNewAsignedStepList.append({"WIOPID":wiStepId,"ID":stepId,"Sequence":sequenceNo,"OPCode":stepName,"OP Definition ID":stepclassId,"Description":description,"OPDefinition":stepClass,"Model":Model})	
		
		#assign sorted list to custom property AsignedStepList	
		selectedRow=selectedRow-1
		self.parent.parent.getChild("tblAssinedSteps").props.selection.selectedRow=selectedRow
		self.view.params.AsignedStepList=sortedNewAsignedStepList
		
		#-----
		totalRecord=len(asignedStepList)
		import math		
		page=float(selectedRow+1)/10
		page=math.ceil(page)
		self.parent.parent.getChild("tblAssinedSteps").props.pager.activePage=page
		#----
		
		#Up Down Button visible check
		self.getSibling("imgRemove").meta.visible=bool(1)
		if(selectedRow==0):
			self.meta.visible=bool(0)
			self.getSibling("imgDown").meta.visible=1
		elif(selectedRow== (len(tableData)-1)):
			self.meta.visible=bool(1)
			self.getSibling("imgDown").meta.visible=0
		else:
			self.meta.visible=bool(1)
			self.getSibling("imgDown").meta.visible=1
		#End Up Down Button visible check
	except:	
		#start of except block		
		screenName ='Work instruction' 
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/PopUp/AddEditWorkInstruction')
		errorFunction = str('Event:OnClick - cntUpDown/imgUp')
		errorType=str('Application')
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID()) 
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error occur			
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber)
self.parent.parent.parent.parent.parent.parent.getChild("cntToolTipUp").meta.visible=1
self.parent.parent.parent.parent.parent.parent.getChild("cntToolTipUp").meta.visible=0

"""
		Written By: Niladri Banerjee
		Written Date: 21/05/2024
		Purpose:			 
				change selected row index Down			
	"""	
	#Down Button
	seqNumber=self.view.custom.seqNumber
	try:
	
		selectedRow=int(self.parent.parent.getChild("tblAssinedSteps").props.selection.selectedRow)
		if(selectedRow!= -1):
			tableData=self.parent.parent.getChild("tblAssinedSteps").props.data
			for rows in range(len(tableData)):
				if(rows==selectedRow):				
					seqNumber=int(tableData[rows]['Sequence'])			
		afterSeqNumber = (seqNumber +1)	
		newAsignedStepList=[]
		sortedNewAsignedStepList = []
		asignedStepList = self.view.params.AsignedStepList
			
		#new list with updated seq no
		#updated seq no are 	
		if(len(asignedStepList)>0):		
			for rows in range(len(asignedStepList)):
				wiStepId=asignedStepList[rows]['WIOPID']
				stepId=int(asignedStepList[rows]['ID'])
				sequenceNo = int(asignedStepList[rows]['Sequence'])
				stepName = str(asignedStepList[rows]['OPCode'])
				###############SD 11/1/2023
				stepName = unicode(stepName,'utf-8')
				####end
				stepclassId= asignedStepList[rows]['OP Definition ID']
				description = str(asignedStepList[rows]['Description'])
				###############SD 11/1/2023
				description = unicode(description,'utf-8')
				####end
#				reworkWPrev = bool(asignedStepList[rows]['Rework with previous'])
#				completeWPrev = bool(asignedStepList[rows]['Complete with previous'])                                           
#				isMandatory = bool(asignedStepList[rows]['Mandatory'])
#				reworkSplI= asignedStepList[rows]['Rework special instruction']
#				rework= asignedStepList[rows]['Rework']		
				Model = asignedStepList[rows]['Model']
				stepClass = asignedStepList[rows]['OPDefinition']	#RA 07-07-2023	
				if(seqNumber==asignedStepList[rows]['Sequence']):
					sequenceNo = afterSeqNumber
				elif(afterSeqNumber == asignedStepList[rows]['Sequence']):	
						sequenceNo = seqNumber
				newAsignedStepList.append({"WIOPID":wiStepId,"ID":stepId,"Sequence":sequenceNo,"OPCode":stepName,"OP Definition ID":stepclassId,"Description":description,"OPDefinition":stepClass,"Model":Model})
		
		#Script for sort list by seq no	
		if(len(newAsignedStepList)>0):	
			Length =  len(newAsignedStepList)
			for row in range(Length):			
				for rows in range(len(newAsignedStepList)):
					wiStepId=newAsignedStepList[rows]['WIOPID']
					stepId=int(newAsignedStepList[rows]['ID'])
					sequenceNo = int(newAsignedStepList[rows]['Sequence'])
					stepName = str(newAsignedStepList[rows]['OPCode'])
					###############SD 11/1/2023
					stepName = unicode(stepName,'utf-8')
					####end
					stepclassId= newAsignedStepList[rows]['OP Definition ID']
					description = str(newAsignedStepList[rows]['Description']) 
					###############SD 11/1/2023
					description = unicode(description,'utf-8')
					####end
#					reworkWPrev = bool(newAsignedStepList[rows]['Rework with previous'])
#					completeWPrev = bool(asignedStepList[rows]['Complete with previous'])  
#					isMandatory = bool(newAsignedStepList[rows]['Mandatory'])
#					reworkSplI= newAsignedStepList[rows]['Rework special instruction']
#					rework= newAsignedStepList[rows]['Rework']			
					Model = asignedStepList[rows]['Model']
					stepClass = newAsignedStepList[rows]['OPDefinition']	#RA 07-07-2023			
					if(int(row + 1) == int(newAsignedStepList[rows]['Sequence'])):
						sortedNewAsignedStepList.append({"WIOPID":wiStepId,"ID":stepId,"Sequence":sequenceNo,"OPCode":stepName,"OP Definition ID":stepclassId,"Description":description,"OPDefinition":stepClass,"Model":Model})	
		
		#assign sorted list to custom property AsignedStepList
		#selectedRow=seqNumber
		selectedRow=selectedRow+1
		self.parent.parent.getChild("tblAssinedSteps").props.selection.selectedRow=selectedRow
		self.view.params.AsignedStepList=sortedNewAsignedStepList
		#Up Down Button visible check
		self.getSibling("imgRemove").meta.visible=bool(1)
		if(selectedRow==0):
			self.meta.visible=bool(1)
			self.getSibling("imgUp").meta.visible=0
		elif(selectedRow== (len(tableData)-1)):
			self.meta.visible=0
			self.getSibling("imgUp").meta.visible=1
		else:		
			self.meta.visible=1
			self.getSibling("imgUp").meta.visible=1
		#End Up Down Button visible check	
	except:	
		#start of except block		
		screenName ='Work instruction' 
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/PopUp/AddEditWorkInstruction')
		errorFunction = str('Event:onClick - cntUpDown/imgDown')
		errorType=str('Application')
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID()) 
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error occur			
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber)
self.parent.parent.parent.parent.parent.parent.getChild("cntToolTipDown").meta.visible=1
self.parent.parent.parent.parent.parent.parent.getChild("cntToolTipDown").meta.visible=0
self.parent.parent.parent.parent.parent.parent.getChild("cntToolTipDelete").meta.visible=1
self.parent.parent.parent.parent.parent.parent.getChild("cntToolTipDelete").meta.visible=0

messageHandlers.script:
"""
			Written By: Niladri Banerjee
			Written Date: 22/05/2024
			Purpose:			 
					Remove selected row from table			
	"""
	seqNumber=self.view.custom.seqNumber
	try:
		selectedRow=int(self.parent.parent.getChild("tblAssinedSteps").props.selection.selectedRow)
		if(selectedRow!=-1):		
			tableData=self.parent.parent.getChild("tblAssinedSteps").props.data
			for rows in range(len(tableData)):
				if(rows==selectedRow):				
					seqNumber=int(tableData[rows]['Sequence'])
					selectedStepId=int(tableData[rows]['ID'])
					selectedStepClassId=int(tableData[rows]['OP Definition ID'])
					
		beforeSeqNumber = (seqNumber -1)
		newAsignedStepList=[]
		newAssignedFixtureList=[]
		sortedNewAsignedStepList = []
		asignedStepList = self.view.params.AsignedStepList
		i=1
		#removing selected seq in the list	
		if(len(asignedStepList)>0):		
			for rows in range(len(asignedStepList)):
				if(int(i) < int(seqNumber)):
					wiStepId=asignedStepList[rows]['WIOPID']	
					stepId=int(asignedStepList[rows]['ID'])				
					sequenceNo = int(asignedStepList[rows]['Sequence'])
					stepName = str(asignedStepList[rows]['OPCode'])
					###############SD 11/1/2023
					stepName = unicode(stepName,'utf-8')
					####end
					stepclassId= asignedStepList[rows]['OP Definition ID']
					description = str(asignedStepList[rows]['Description'])
					Model=str(asignedStepList[rows]['Model'])
					###############SD 11/1/2023
					description = unicode(description,'utf-8')
					####end
#					rework = bool(asignedStepList[rows]['Rework with previous'])	
#					completeWPrev = bool(asignedStepList[rows]['Complete with previous'])  		
					sequenceNo==int(asignedStepList[rows]['Sequence'])
#					isMandatory = bool(asignedStepList[rows]['Mandatory'])
#					reworkSplI= asignedStepList[rows]['Rework special instruction']
#					rework= asignedStepList[rows]['Rework']
#					eDHR = asignedStepList[rows]['eDHR']	
					stepClass = asignedStepList[rows]['OPDefinition']	#RA 07-07-2023	
					i=i+1					
					newAsignedStepList.append({"WIOPID":wiStepId,"ID":stepId,"Sequence":sequenceNo,"OPCode":stepName,"OP Definition ID":stepclassId,"Description":description,"OPDefinition":stepClass,"Model":Model})
				else:
					if(seqNumber!=asignedStepList[rows]['Sequence']):
						wiStepId=asignedStepList[rows]['WIOPID']	
						stepId=int(asignedStepList[rows]['ID'])
						sequenceNo = int(asignedStepList[rows]['Sequence'])
						stepName = str(asignedStepList[rows]['OPCode'])
						###############SD 11/1/2023
						stepName = unicode(stepName,'utf-8')
						####end
						stepclassId= asignedStepList[rows]['OP Definition ID']
						description = str(asignedStepList[rows]['Description'])
						Model=str(asignedStepList[rows]['Model']) 
						###############SD 11/1/2023
						description = unicode(description,'utf-8')
						####end
#						rework = bool(asignedStepList[rows]['Rework with previous'])
#						completeWPrev = bool(asignedStepList[rows]['Complete with previous'])  
#						isMandatory = bool(asignedStepList[rows]['Mandatory'])
#						reworkSplI= asignedStepList[rows]['Rework special instruction']			
						seqNumber=int(asignedStepList[rows]['Sequence'])
#						rework= asignedStepList[rows]['Rework']
#						eDHR = asignedStepList[rows]['eDHR']	
						stepClass = asignedStepList[rows]['OPDefinition']	#RA 07-07-2023	
						sequenceNo = seqNumber-1
						i=i+1
						newAsignedStepList.append({"WIOPID":wiStepId,"ID":stepId,"Sequence":sequenceNo,"OPCode":stepName,"OP Definition ID":stepclassId,"Description":description,"OPDefinition":stepClass,"Model":Model})
			
		#assign sorted list to custom property AsignedStepList
		self.view.params.AsignedStepList=newAsignedStepList
		
#		if(selectedStepClassId==3):
#			#check step fixture data available if yes then delete fixture data
#			assignedFixtureList=self.view.params.AssignedFixtureList
#			asignedStepList=self.view.params.AsignedStepList
#			isStepExist=0
#			if(len(newAsignedStepList)>0):
#				for row in range(len(newAsignedStepList)):
#					stepId=int(newAsignedStepList[row]['StepId'])
#					if(selectedStepId==stepId):
#						isStepExist=1
#						break
#					
#			if(isStepExist==0):
#				if(len(assignedFixtureList)>0):
#					#Deleted step is in the fixture list
#					for row in range(len(assignedFixtureList)):
#						fixtureStepId= assignedFixtureList[row]['StepId'] 
#						if(selectedStepId!=fixtureStepId):
#							fixtureId= assignedFixtureList[row]['fixtureId']
#							fixtureName= assignedFixtureList[row]['Fixture name']
#							###############SD 11/1/2023
#							fixtureName = unicode(fixtureName,'utf-8')
#							####end
#							description= assignedFixtureList[row]['Description']
#							###############SD 11/1/2023
#							description = unicode(description,'utf-8')
#							####end
#							stepId= assignedFixtureList[row]['StepId']
#							stepName= assignedFixtureList[row]['Step name']
#							###############SD 11/1/2023
#							stepName = unicode(stepName,'utf-8')
#							####end
#							newAssignedFixtureList.append({"fixtureId":fixtureId,"Fixture name":fixtureName,"StepId":int(stepId),"Step name":stepName,"Description":str(description)})
#							self.view.params.AssignedFixtureList = 	newAssignedFixtureList
#						else:
#							if(len(assignedFixtureList)==1):
#								self.view.params.AssignedFixtureList = []
			
		if(selectedRow==0 and len(newAsignedStepList)>0):
			selectedRow=0
		else:
			selectedRow=selectedRow-1
				
		self.parent.parent.getChild("tblAssinedSteps").props.selection.selectedRow=selectedRow	
		
		if(selectedRow==0):
			self.getSibling("imgUp").meta.visible=bool(0)
			self.getSibling("imgDown").meta.visible=0
		elif(selectedRow== (len(newAsignedStepList)-1)):
			self.getSibling("imgUp").meta.visible=bool(1)
			self.getSibling("imgDown").meta.visible=0
		else:
			self.getSibling("imgUp").meta.visible=bool(1)
			self.getSibling("imgDown").meta.visible=1
			
		if(selectedRow== -1):
			self.meta.visible=bool(0)
			self.getSibling("imgUp").meta.visible=bool(0)
			self.getSibling("imgDown").meta.visible=0
			self.parent.parent.parent.parent.parent.getChild("cntSave").getChild("btnSave").props.enabled=0
				
		system.perspective.closePopup("DeleteAsgnStep")
	except:	
		#start of except block
		system.perspective.print('Exception')		
		screenName ='Work instruction' 
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/PopUp/AddEditWorkInstruction')
		errorFunction = str('Message Handler: cntUpDown/imgRemove - deleteAssignedStep')
		errorType=str('Application')
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID()) 
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error occur			
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber)

config.script:
try:
	
		if(self.props.currentTabIndex == 0):
			pass

		if(self.props.currentTabIndex == 1):

			system.perspective.print('Assigned List in table'+str(self.view.params.AsignedStepList))
	except: 
		#Start of except block  
			screenName ='AddEditWorkInstruction'   
			filePath=str('Project_VECV/PopUp/AddEditWorkInstruction')  
			errorFunction = str('Event:onCLick  -> cntTab')  
			errorType=str('Application')  
			errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())
			description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
			lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
			Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber) 
		#End of except block

"""
		Written By: Niladri Banerjee
		Written Date: 30/05/2024
		Purpose: Set to default on page startup. 
	"""
	self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntTab").getChild("cntTab").props.currentTabIndex=0
	self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntTab").getChild("cntTab").getChild("cntStep").getChild("cntAdd").getChild("btnAdd").props.enabled = 0
	self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntTab").getChild("cntTab").getChild("cntStep").getChild("chkSelectAll").props.selected = bool(0)
